name: Escape from biochemical
short_description: 《Escape from the Biochemical》 is a 3D single-player puzzle horror game. The protagonist needs to complete various tasks while being chased by the experimental subjects and then escape from there.
detailed_description:
This game is developed by an individual. Since it is a horror game, there are some high-energy scenes. Please play it with caution.

《Escape from Biochemical》 is a 3D single-player puzzle horror game. The game's story tells that the protagonist is deceived by the government and forced to research biochemical weapons in an underground secret biochemical laboratory. You will play the role of a scientist trying to escape from the laboratory.

The story plot is that an accident occurs in the laboratory. The biochemical test subjects in the laboratory escape and attack everyone in the laboratory without discrimination. In the end, except for the protagonist, no one in the laboratory survives. The protagonist escapes the disaster because he was sleeping in the dormitory. When he wakes up, the laboratory is in a mess. The protagonist reports the situation to the government immediately. However, knowing the terrifying nature of the virus carried by the test subjects and fearing that the virus will spread, the government seals off the only exit of the laboratory and assigns the protagonist four tasks, promising to let him out once he completes them. The protagonist has no choice but to reluctantly agree. The protagonist needs to complete various tasks while being chased by the test subjects and escape from the laboratory.

The game tasks are as follows:

  • Collect the potions in the laboratory to eliminate the virus in the laboratory.

  • Place three explosives to blow up the mutant test subjects.

  • Take away the virus vaccine in the laboratory.

  • Kill the mutant test subjects with a sword.

The special gameplay features are:

  • Multiple game difficulties
    The game has four modes: Easy, Normal, Hard, and Nightmare, which makes the game highly challenging.

  • Multiple game endings
    Collect a certain number of easter eggs to trigger another game ending.
